20:14.arabic: إِنَّنِىٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدْنِى وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكْرِىٓ
20:14.english: Indeed, I am Allah — there is no god but Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance.
20:14.score_notes: Allah speaking directly to Musa at the burning bush — powerful story, connects to salah.

lesson_use.arabic: إِنَّنِي أَنَا اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنَا فَاعْبُدْنِي وَأَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ لِذِكْرِي
lesson_use.english: Indeed I am Allah — there is no god but Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance
lesson_use.notes: Allah speaking directly to Musa at the burning bush. Iconic prophet story. Reinforces the la ilaha illa pattern from L1's anchor (59:22).
